question: Does the paper report HIV sequences from patient samples?
explain: The paper mentions that RNA was isolated from five individuals and DNA from two individuals, indicating that HIV sequences were obtained from patient samples.
sentences: RNA was isolated from five individuals (TV047, TV096, TV101, TV218, and TV546) and DNA from TV016 and TV1057; Plasma and peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) samples from the Tygerberg Virology (TV) cohort were obtained between 1998 and 2004.

question: Does the paper report in vitro drug susceptibility data?
explain: The paper does not mention any in vitro drug susceptibility testing or results. It focuses on sequencing and phylogenetic analysis of HIV-1 subtypes.
sentences: The paper does not mention any in vitro drug susceptibility testing or results.

question: What were the GenBank accession numbers for sequenced HIV isolates?
explain: The paper states that the sequences analyzed during the study have been deposited in GenBank under the accession numbers KJ948656 to KJ948662.
sentences: The sequences analyzed during the study have been deposited in GenBank and are available under the following accession numbers: KJ948656 to KJ948662.

question: Which HIV species were studied in the paper?
explain: The paper specifically mentions the study of HIV-1 subtypes A, B, G, and unique recombinant forms AC and AD.
sentences: Sequencing and Phylogenetic Analysis of Near Full-Length HIV-1 Subtypes A, B, G and Unique Recombinant AC and AD Viral Strains Identified in South Africa; By the end of 2012, more than 6.1 million people were infected with HIV-1 in South Africa.

question: Which HIV genes were reported to have been sequenced?
explain: The paper reports the sequencing of near full-length genomes (NFLGs) of HIV-1, which includes the structural genes gag, pol, and env, as well as regulatory/accessory genes vif, vpr, vpu, nef, tat, and rev.
sentences: The NFLGs of these samples were amplified in overlapping fragments and sequenced; Open reading frames (ORFs) were identified for gag, pol, and env structural genes and for vif, vpr, vpu, nef, tat, and rev regulatory/accessory genes.

question: From which countries were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper mentions that the samples were obtained from the Tygerberg Virology (TV) cohort in South Africa.
sentences: Seven patients from the Tygerberg Virology (TV) cohort were previously identified as possible non-C subtypes and were selected for further analyses; All of these NFLGs identified in the present study were characterized in HIV-1-infected South Africans.

question: From what years were the sequenced samples obtained?
explain: The paper states that plasma and peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) samples from the Tygerberg Virology (TV) cohort were obtained between 1998 and 2004.
sentences: Plasma and peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) samples from the Tygerberg Virology (TV) cohort were obtained between 1998 and 2004.

question: What method was used for sequencing?
explain: The paper describes the use of the ABI Prism Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Reactions kit and the ABI PRISM 3100 Genetic Analyser, which are associated with Sanger sequencing.
sentences: PCR products were purified with the QIAquick PCR purification kit (Qiagen Inc.) and both strands were sequenced directly using the ABI Prism Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Reactions kit v. 1.0 (Applied Biosystems) and the ABI PRISM 3100 Genetic Analyser (Applied Biosystems); Sequencing reactions were done with the ABI Prism BigDye Terminator Cycle sequencing kit v. 1.0 and run on the ABI 3130xl automated DNA sequencer (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, CA).

question: Were samples cloned prior to sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention any cloning of samples prior to sequencing. It describes direct sequencing of PCR products.
sentences: PCR products were purified with the QIAquick PCR purification kit (Qiagen Inc.) and both strands were sequenced directly using the ABI Prism Big Dye Terminator Cycle Sequencing Reactions kit v. 1.0 (Applied Biosystems) and the ABI PRISM 3100 Genetic Analyser (Applied Biosystems); Sequencing reactions were done with the ABI Prism BigDye Terminator Cycle sequencing kit v. 1.0 and run on the ABI 3130xl automated DNA sequencer (Applied Biosystems, Foster City, CA).

question: Did samples undergo single genome sequencing?
explain: The paper does not mention single genome sequencing. It describes sequencing of overlapping fragments and assembly of near full-length genomes.
sentences: The NFLGs of these samples were amplified in overlapping fragments and sequenced; Assembly of the overlapping amplification products TV47 (9,083 nucleotides), TV96 (9,058 nucleotides), TV101 (9,038 nucleotides), TV218 (9,039 nucleotides), and TV546 (9,104 nucleotides) resulted in characterization of NFLG spanning from the 5' U5 region through the 3' U3 region.

question: What clinical specimens were sequenced?
explain: The paper mentions that RNA was isolated from plasma samples and DNA from peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) samples.
sentences: RNA was isolated from five individuals (TV047, TV096, TV101, TV218, and TV546) and DNA from TV016 and TV1057; Plasma and peripheral blood mononuclear cell (PBMC) samples from the Tygerberg Virology (TV) cohort were obtained between 1998 and 2004.

question: Were any sequences obtained from individuals with virological failure on a treatment regimen?
explain: The paper mentions that two patients were receiving antiretroviral therapy at the time of sampling, indicating that sequences were obtained from individuals with virological failure on a treatment regimen.
sentences: These two samples were genotyped from proviral DNA due to the lack of plasma in the case of TV016, the difficulty in amplifying from RNA in the case of TV1057, and the fact that these two patients were on treatment at the time of sampling; The dates of sampling collection predate the implementation of the public national HIV treatment campaign and thus only two of the patients were receiving antiretroviral therapy at the time of sampling.

question: Were any sequences obtained from the proviral DNA reservoir?
explain: The paper mentions that DNA was extracted from cultured TV016 and uncultured TV1057, indicating that sequences were obtained from the proviral DNA reservoir.
sentences: High-molecular-weight DNA was extracted from cultured TV016 using the Qiagen DNAeasy Blood and Tissue kit and from uncultured TV1057 using the QIAmp DNA Mini kit (Qiagen, GmbH, Hilden, Germany); These two samples were genotyped from proviral DNA due to the lack of plasma in the case of TV016, the difficulty in amplifying from RNA in the case of TV1057, and the fact that these two patients were on treatment at the time of sampling.
